# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to NudgeWhen. Please complete the sections below. If a section is not applicable, write "Not applicable" and explain briefly.

## Summary

What does this pull request change? Keep it short.

## Motivation and linked issue

Why is this change needed? Link any related issue, or write "None".

## Exact scope

What files are changed? What is the precise effect of each change? Be explicit. Do not include unrelated changes.

## Change type

What kind of change is this? Examples: documentation, community-file, experiment record, bug fix, refactor, new feature. If not applicable, write "Not applicable".

## Validation performed

What did you do to verify the change? Include commands run, observations, and exit statuses. If a check is not applicable at this stage, say so explicitly. Do not claim validation that did not occur.

## Documentation impact

Which documents are affected? Did you update cross-references? Did you update the repository structure description in `README.md` if applicable?

## Security and privacy considerations

Did the change touch any configuration that could affect security or privacy? Did you avoid committing secrets, credentials, tokens, personal paths, machine names, or private data? If not applicable, write "Not applicable".

## Backward compatibility and migration impact

If the change affects existing behaviour, describe the impact and any migration steps. For most contributions at this stage, write "Not applicable" and explain briefly.

## AI assistance disclosure

If AI tools were used in any part of this contribution, describe the scope of AI use. The contributor must perform a full human review of the entire contribution before submission and remains responsible for the submitted work.

## Checklist

- [ ] The scope of this pull request is focused.
- [ ] All claims in the description are truthful.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, private paths, machine names, or personal data are included.
- [ ] No raw agent transcripts or session exports are included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where it is affected.
- [ ] Relevant validation was run, or the absence of validation is explained.
- [ ] If application code is affected, the relevant build or test steps are described; if no build or test suite exists yet, this is stated.
- [ ] Security reports are not included in this pull request.
- [ ] This contribution follows `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.

## Conditional items

If a build or test suite exists, run it before requesting review. If neither exists yet (the current state for this project), state that explicitly.

## Related documents

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
- [LICENSE](../LICENSE)
